description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This fragrance is tempting and quite irresistible. Product Details Rasasi Fighting Temptation is a perfume spray for men with a playful yet innocent fragrance. Top notes are bergamot, lemon, lime and mandarin. The middle notes are coriander, marine notes and freesia. The base notes are cedar, moss, musk and patchouli. This perfume comes in a chocolatey flask with elegant styling Size 100 ml
